title: NVIDIA — block library
tagline: Synthetic catalog page (no live nvidia.com source). Composes the 25-block layout vocabulary used by the gensite intent-to-layout pipeline into one continuous reference, every block at full size, in context, against the approved Mode A brand-faithful tokens.

source.syntheticNote: No live source. Page is composed from the 25 blocks in stardust/blocks-catalog.md, sourced against captured corpus content from 40 nvidia.com/en-us/ pages.

direction.phrase: follow the current NVIDIA design and apply improvements that preserve the current design principles
movements: purpose: developer + LLM reference for the gensite block vocabulary
composition: every block rendered at full size, in context, with a label card carrying ID + purpose + content shape + status + source page
tokens: inherited from approved home canon (Mode A brand-faithful)
two-surface alternation: D-W-D-W between blocks so the cadence reads

seed.pickedBy: inherited (Mode A, from approved home canon)

palette.name: NVIDIA brand-pinned
brandFaithfulInversions: NVIDIA green #76b900 retained as single CTA accent

variants.name: Block catalog
variants.thesis: One continuous scroll exposing all 25 blocks (Tier 1 chrome → Tier 5 long-form) in render order. Each block preceded by a small label card so the developer or the LLM running the intent-to-layout pipeline can map ID → visual sample without leaving the page. Status flag distinguishes 'built' (lifted from approved canon) from 'v0' (first draft).
